UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-trigger commit skill when git commit/push keywords are mentioned

hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.prompt // "" | test("\\bcommit\\b|\\bpush\\b|commit and push"; "i")) then {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: The user wants to commit/push. You MUST invoke the commit skill using the Skill tool BEFORE doing anything else."}} else empty end'
